name: maritime_safety_cross_border_data_northpine_ind_col
premise: A Maritime Safety response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving maritime safety cross border data northpine ind col. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is in the next hour. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as individual vs collective under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Jonah Berg
agents.identity: I am Jonah Berg, accountable for a defensible call in Maritime Safety when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays collective for individual.

agents.name: Keisha Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Keisha Ibrahim, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Maritime Safety.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so collective isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of individual.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect collective.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to collective to secure individual under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is in the next hour. Evidence is partial. Jonah Berg must decide under individual vs collective. What does Jonah Berg do?
